name: MiraeAsset KRXGold Auto-KO-C 23
summary: MiraeAsset KRXGold Auto-KO-C 23 is an Exchange Traded Note (ETN) managed by Mirae Asset Daewoo Co., Ltd, providing exposure to gold and incorporating a knock-out feature. This ETN tracks the performance of gold and includes a mechanism where the note can be terminated if the price of gold reaches a certain level. It is listed on the Korea Exchange.
